tweets.text:
🚀 Crypto market update:

Bitcoin consolidating above $67K. ETF inflows continue. Altcoin season brewing? Watch for breakouts in:
- Layer 2s
- DeFi blue chips
- AI tokens

Patience pays.

🏦 CBDC development pipeline:

• China: 260M+ wallets, $250B+ transactions
• India: Digital rupee pilot expanding
• Brazil: Drex CBDC launching 2024
• Europe: Digital euro preparation phase

The race is accelerating.

💡 DeFi yield strategies (educational):

Traditional: 4-5% APY (banks)
DeFi lending: 6-12% APY
Liquidity mining: 15-40% APY

Risks:
- Smart contract bugs
- Impermanent loss
- Token volatility

DYOR always.

🌐 Web3 infrastructure 2026:

1. AI + Blockchain integration
2. Zero-knowledge proofs mainstream
3. Modular blockchain architecture
4. Account abstraction (ERC-4337)
5. Cross-chain interoperability

The stack is maturing.

💰 Stablecoin market insights:

• USDT: $100B+ market cap dominance
• USDC: Regulated, institutional favorite
• DAI: Decentralized, overcollateralized
• PYUSD: PayPal's entry

Total market: $150B+ and growing.

📈 Product growth frameworks:

AARRR:
- Acquisition (SEO/ads)
- Activation (onboarding)
- Retention (engagement)
- Referral (virality)
- Revenue (monetization)

Measure each. Optimize bottlenecks.

🔒 Crypto security essentials:

✓ Hardware wallet for >$1K holdings
✓ 2FA on all exchanges
✓ Never share seed phrases
✓ Verify contract addresses
✓ Use multisig for treasuries

Security is not optional.

🌍 Emerging markets crypto adoption:

• Nigeria: 35% crypto ownership
• Vietnam: 21% adoption rate
• Turkey: Inflation hedge
• Argentina: Peso devaluation protection

Real utility drives real adoption.

🏛️ Regulatory landscape update:

• US: Spot ETFs approved, clarity coming
• EU: MiCA framework implementation
• UK: Regulatory sandbox expansion
• Asia: Mixed but evolving

Regulation = Mainstream adoption.

🎯 Weekend reading list:

1. Bitcoin Whitepaper (re-read it)
2. Ethereum documentation
3. Your favorite project's roadmap
4. DeFi protocol docs

Knowledge compounds like interest.

🔥 Product Spotlight:

Vercel (@vercel) - Deploy in seconds, scale automatically. The gold standard for frontend hosting.

What tools are you using that just *work*?
